title: What the Iran War Means for the U.S.-China Relationship
summary_full: With the Xi-Trump summit almost certainly delayed, and tensions rising over the war in Iran, vital issues for both the U.S. and China are also being cast into uncertainty.
summary_public: With the Xi-Trump summit almost certainly delayed, and tensions rising over the war in Iran, vital issues for both the U.S. and China are also being cast into uncertainty.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: tensions rising over the war in Iran
